title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A young shepherd's journey to find treasure and discover his Personal Legend.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship for writing better code.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Explores the universe's origin, black holes, and the nature of time.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and enters a magical world.

title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
author: Douglas Crockford
description: Unearthing the excellence in JavaScript programming language.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A personal journey through space and time exploring the universe.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A story of racial injustice and loss of innocence in the American South.

title: You Don't Know JS
author: Kyle Simpson
description: A deep dive into the core mechanisms of the JavaScript language.

title: The Gene
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
description: An intimate history of the gene and genetic science.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A tale of wealth, love, and the American Dream in the 1920s.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: David Thomas
description: Your journey to mastery in software development.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind from ancient times to modern day.
